sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 47:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 47:1
items.html: The one that receives within can only hold a limited amount of light, according to the size of the vessel. For one that receives without, the vessel does not limit the light that it holds, and it is without a limit. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 50)
